briefdescription.para: Route for the CID wasn't found.
The peer that has the CID is blacklisted.
Start wasn't called, or StopSync was called.

memberdef.type: std::map< CID, std::tuple< std::shared_ptr< Subscription >, std::shared_ptr< std::promise< std::shared_ptr< ipfs_lite::ipld::IPLDNode > > > > >

memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< IpfsDatastore > service, std::shared_ptr< Graphsync > graphsync, std::shared_ptr< libp2p::Host > host)
memberdef.name: GraphsyncDAGSyncer

detaileddescription.para: Starts instance and subscribes to blocks

memberdef.argsstring: (const CID &cid, const PeerId &peer, std::vector< Multiaddress > address)
memberdef.name: AddRoute

memberdef.argsstring: (gsl::span< const uint8_t > root_cid, gsl::span< const uint8_t > selector, std::function< bool(std::shared_ptr< const ipfs_lite::ipld::IPLDNode > node)> handler) const override
memberdef.name: select

detaileddescription.para:
Check if the block with cid is locally available (therefore, it is considered processed).
cid
Content identifier of the node
true if the block is locally available or outcome::failure on error

memberdef.argsstring: (ipfs_lite::ipld::IPLDNode &node, std::string link_name="", LinkInfoSet visited={}) const override
memberdef.name: TraverseCIDsLinks

memberdef.argsstring: (const PeerId &peer, boost::optional< std::vector< Multiaddress > > address, const CID &root_cid) const
memberdef.name: RequestNode

briefdescription.para: Using exponential backoff for both cases but with different base values.
A DAGSyncer is an abstraction to an IPLD-based p2p storage layer. A DAGSyncer is a DAGService with the ability to publish new ipld nodes to the network, and retrieving others from it.

node.label: std::map< CID, std::pair< std::shared_ptr< ipfs_lite::ipld::IPLDNode >, std::list< CID >::iterator > >

childnode.edgelabel: < CID, std::pair< std::shared_ptr< ipfs_lite::ipld::IPLDNode >, std::list< CID >::iterator > >

node.label: std::map< CID, std::tuple< std::shared_ptr< Subscription >, std::shared_ptr< std::promise< std::shared_ptr< ipfs_lite::ipld::IPLDNode > > > > >

childnode.edgelabel: < CID, std::tuple< std::shared_ptr< Subscription >, std::shared_ptr< std::promise< std::shared_ptr< ipfs_lite::ipld::IPLDNode > > > > >
